member.name: P:Sharlayan.Core.ChatLogItem.PlayerCharacterName
member.summary: character name of player that was loaded when log was detected

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Core.ChatLogItem.Bytes
member.summary: raw bytes from memory

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Core.ChatLogItem.Code
member.summary: alphanumeric chat code

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Core.ChatLogItem.Combined
member.summary: [Code]:[Line] combination string

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Core.ChatLogItem.IsInternational
member.summary: does the text contain non-roman text

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Core.ChatLogItem.Line
member.summary: "(playerName )?messsage" combination string

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Core.ChatLogItem.Message
member.summary: message without name of player

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Core.ChatLogItem.PlayerName
member.summary: player name from message

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Core.ChatLogItem.Raw
member.summary: raw bytes decoded to string

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Core.ChatLogItem.TimeStamp
member.summary: message timestamp

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Core.Interfaces.IStatusItem.StatusNameEnglish
member.summary: Always-English name regardless of . Use for programmatic comparisons against hardcoded English literals (e.g. statuses.Find(s => s.StatusNameEnglish == "Iron Will")); use for display.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Core.StatusItem.StatusNameEnglish
member.summary: Always-English name regardless of . Use for programmatic comparisons against hardcoded English literals (e.g. statuses.Find(s => s.StatusNameEnglish == "Iron Will")); use for display.

member.name: M:Sharlayan.LuminaLookup.WeatherIdFromName(Sharlayan.SharlayanConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Translate a Weather row's localised name (e.g. "Moon Dust") to its universal RowId.

member.name: M:Sharlayan.LuminaLookup.ActionIdFromName(Sharlayan.SharlayanConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Translate an Action row's localised name (e.g. "リフルジェントアロー") to its universal RowId.

member.name: M:Sharlayan.LuminaLookup.StatusIdFromName(Sharlayan.SharlayanConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Translate a Status (status effect) row's localised name to its universal RowId.

member.name: M:Sharlayan.LuminaLookup.PlaceNameIdFromName(Sharlayan.SharlayanConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Translate a PlaceName row's localised name (zones / fields / districts) to its universal RowId.

member.name: M:Sharlayan.LuminaLookup.ContentFinderConditionIdFromName(Sharlayan.SharlayanConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Translate a ContentFinderCondition (duty / instance / raid) localised name to its universal RowId.

member.name: M:Sharlayan.LuminaLookup.ItemIdFromName(Sharlayan.SharlayanConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Translate an Item row's localised name to its universal RowId.

member.name: M:Sharlayan.LuminaLookup.BNpcNameIdFromName(Sharlayan.SharlayanConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Translate a BNpcName (battle NPC / mob) row's Singular localised name to its universal RowId.

member.name: M:Sharlayan.LuminaLookup.ENpcResidentIdFromName(Sharlayan.SharlayanConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Translate an ENpcResident (event NPC / friendly NPC) Singular localised name to its universal RowId.

member.name: M:Sharlayan.LuminaLookup.MountIdFromName(Sharlayan.SharlayanConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Translate a Mount row's Singular localised name to its universal RowId.

member.name: M:Sharlayan.LuminaLookup.CompanionIdFromName(Sharlayan.SharlayanConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Translate a Companion (minion) row's Singular localised name to its universal RowId.

member.name: M:Sharlayan.LuminaLookup.FindRowId``1(Sharlayan.SharlayanConfiguration,System.String,System.Func{``0,System.String})
member.summary: Lower-level entry point: given a sheet row type and a name selector, return the row id whose name matches. Useful for callers that need a sheet not exposed by the dedicated helpers above. The cache is keyed on so each unique row type gets one lookup table built across all 4 languages.

member.name: M:Sharlayan.LuminaLookup.ClearCache
member.summary: Drops the cached lookups so the next call will rebuild them. Useful if the sqpack path or game install changes mid-process. Rare in practice — most callers can ignore this.

member.name: T:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.BgmSceneType
member.summary: Index into . Mirrors the FFXIVClientStructs BGMSystem.Scene.SceneId documentation. and are present for completeness; FCS doesn't have firm names.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.BgmSceneInfo.Index
member.summary: 0..11 — same as cast to int.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.BgmSceneInfo.SceneType
member.summary: Named slot — see for the priority order.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.BgmSceneInfo.BgmId
member.summary: Scene.BgmId — the *intended* track for this scene. May differ from mid-BGMSwitch and converges once the swap completes.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.BgmSceneInfo.PlayingBgmId
member.summary: Scene.PlayingBgmId — the track actually selected on this scene. Note id 0 means "no track" and id 1 is FFXIV's silence sentinel; both are treated as not-playing by .

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.BgmSceneInfo.PreviousBgmId
member.summary: Scene.PreviousBgmId. FCS comment: "holds BgmId until after BGMSwitch selection" — useful for tracking transitions.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.BgmSceneInfo.IsPlaying
member.summary: True iff is non-zero AND not the silence sentinel (id=1). Cheap convenience over the raw id.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.BgmSceneInfo.PlayingBgmFile
member.summary: Lumina-resolved file path for (e.g. "music/ffxiv/BGM_Field_Gri_Day.scd"). Null when is false or when sqpack/Lumina isn't available.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.BgmSceneInfo.PlayState
member.summary: Scene.PlayState — manual control flag set by BGMSystem.SetBGMPlayState. 0 = Paused, 1 = Playing. Note the game does *not* write this during normal playback; expect it to stay 0 for most scenes. Exposed for completeness.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.BgmSceneInfo.EnableCustomFade
member.summary: Scene.EnableCustomFade — true when the per-scene fade overrides ( / ) are populated. When false, the game uses defaults from the BGMFadeType Excel sheet and the local fade fields stay at 0.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.BgmSceneInfo.FadeOutTime
member.summary: Per-scene fade-out duration override (ms). Only meaningful when is true.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.BgmSceneInfo.FadeInTime
member.summary: Per-scene fade-in duration override (ms). Only meaningful when is true.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.BgmSceneInfo.PresetFadeOutTime
member.summary: BGMFadeType.FadeOutTime (seconds) for the preset fade-into-this-scene row.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.BgmSceneInfo.PresetFadeInTime
member.summary: BGMFadeType.FadeInTime (seconds) — duration of the volume ramp once fade-in actually begins.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.BgmSceneInfo.PresetFadeInStartTime
member.summary: BGMFadeType.FadeInStartTime (seconds) — delay between the scene's PlayingBgmId becoming non-zero and the audio starting its ramp. This is the "delayed start" you observe when IsPlaying flips true before audio is heard: audible at (IsPlaying rising edge) + PresetFadeInStartTime, full volume at (rising edge) + PresetFadeInStartTime + PresetFadeInTime.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.BgmSceneInfo.PresetResumeFadeInTime
member.summary: BGMFadeType.ResumeFadeInTime (seconds) — used when resuming a previously paused track rather than starting fresh.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.GameStateResult.TerritoryLoadState
member.summary: GameMain.TerritoryLoadState raw byte: 1 = loading, 2 = loaded, 3 = unloading.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.GameStateResult.WatchingCutscene
member.summary: True while a cutscene is playing (Conditions.WatchingCutscene / 78).

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.GameStateResult.IsTeleporting
member.summary: True while the player is travelling between zones or entering/exiting an instance (Conditions.BetweenAreas or BetweenAreas51). Distinct from WatchingCutscene — a genuine cutscene has WatchingCutscene=true and IsTeleporting=false. ActorItem.InCutscene (from RenderFlags) fires for both; use IsTeleporting to tell them apart.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.GameStateResult.ContentsFinderQueueState
member.summary: Raw ContentsFinderQueueInfo.QueueState byte (0=None, 1=Pending, 2=Queued, 3=Ready (popped), 4=Accepted, 5=InContent).

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.GameStateResult.DutyFinderBellPopped
member.summary: QueueState == 3 — Duty Finder popped but not accepted yet.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.GameStateResult.InInstance
member.summary: QueueState >= 4 — Accepted (entering) or already inside the instance.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.GameStateResult.InstanceState
member.summary: Alias preserved for parity with the pre-rebuild Chromatics extension, which exposed this byte directly.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.GameStateResult.CurrentWeatherId
member.summary: WeatherManager.WeatherId — row id in the Weather Excel sheet.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.GameStateResult.CurrentWeatherName
member.summary: Localised name from the Weather sheet; null if GameInstallPath wasn't set or the row is missing.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.GameStateResult.CurrentBgmId
member.summary: Sourced from Scene.PlayingBgmId on the highest-priority scene currently playing audible audio (walks BGMSystem.Scenes 0..N skipping scenes parked on id=0 or id=1 silence sentinel). 0 if no scene has audible audio.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.GameStateResult.CurrentBgmTargetId
member.summary: Sourced from Scene.BgmId (the "intended" track) on the same winning scene as . When CurrentBgmTargetId != CurrentBgmId the scene is mid-BGMSwitch — useful as a "BGM transition in progress" signal that settles at the new value once the swap completes.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.GameStateResult.BgmScenes
member.summary:
One per slot in BGMSystem.Scenes (currently 12, indexed via ). Scenes are priority-ordered: index 0 (Event) wins over index 11 (Territory). The "winning" scene's values are also exposed flat as / / / ; this array gives downstream consumers visibility into every layer (e.g. the Battle scene track while an Event scene is also active).
Empty if BGMSYSTEM didn't resolve. Always 12 elements when populated.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.GameStateResult.CurrentBgmSceneId
member.summary: BGMScene row index that's currently playing (0 = Event, 1 = Battle, ..., 11 = Territory). -1 if none.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.GameStateResult.CurrentBgmFile
member.summary: BGM file path from the BGM sheet (e.g. "music/ffxiv/BGM_Field_Gri_Day.scd"); null if unavailable.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.GameStateResult.BgmFadeIn
member.summary: Highest non-zero BGMFadeType.FadeInStartTime (seconds) across every entry in . This is the *delay* between a scene's PlayingBgmId becoming non-zero and audio actually starting its volume ramp; the longest such delay among all scenes is what determines when the user will hear the new track. Zero scenes don't contribute — a single scene with a 0.5s start delay wins over many scenes at 0. 0 if all scenes are 0 or sqpack/Lumina isn't available.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.GameStateResult.BgmResume
member.summary: Highest non-zero BGMFadeType.ResumeFadeInTime (seconds) across every entry in . Used by the game when resuming a previously paused track rather than starting fresh. Zero entries are skipped. 0 if all scenes are 0 or sqpack/Lumina isn't available.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.GameStateResult.AnySoundLoading
member.summary: True if any active SoundData entry has IsLoadingSoundResource set. Walked from SoundManager.ActiveSoundDataListHead following ISoundData.Next. This is a coarse "audio engine is loading something right now" signal — during a BGM transition (zone change, scene swap) the new BGM SoundData briefly raises this flag, so it works as a proxy for "BGM is transitioning". Returns false during steady-state playback. Set to false if SoundManager isn't resolved.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.ReadResults.GameStateResult.IsBgmAudible
member.summary:
True when audible audio energy is present on the *music* bus specifically (sourced from SoundManager._FFTBlue1 — FCS labels Blue as the Music bus, distinct from Red=System and Green=SE/Voice/Instruments).
Post-master-volume — this is the speaker output, so muting BGM in-game or dropping the slider to 0 will keep this false even when music is playing in the audio engine. For a pre-fader signal that ignores user volume settings, consume directly (a non-zero PlayingBgmId on any scene means the audio engine has selected a track regardless of user volume).
Set to false if SoundManager isn't resolved.

member.name: P:Sharlayan.Models.XIVDatabase.StatusItem.MaxStacks
member.summary: Max simultaneous stacks per Lumina's Status sheet (MaxStacks column). 0 or 1 means the status doesn't stack — its in-memory Status.Param field encodes something other than a stack count (food/potion id, or unrelated meta for ordinary buffs), so resolvers should leave StatusItem.Stacks at 0 rather than surfacing the Param byte as a misleading "stacks" value.

member.name: M:Sharlayan.Reader.GetZoneName(System.UInt32,System.String)
member.summary: Resolve a TerritoryType row id to its PlaceName in the requested language. Accepts "en" / "de" / "fr" / "ja" (case-insensitive). Returns null if Lumina isn't available, the row doesn't exist, or the language isn't supported.

member.name: M:Sharlayan.Reader.GetExpTable
member.summary: Returns a dictionary mapping character level → total EXP required to reach the next level (ParamGrow.ExpToNext). Empty dictionary if Lumina isn't available. The table is stable across play sessions so callers can cache the result.

member.name: M:Sharlayan.Reader.GetWeatherName(System.Byte,System.String)
member.summary: Resolve a Weather row id (typically from ) to its display name in the requested language. Useful if a consumer already has a weather id from somewhere other than .

member.name: M:Sharlayan.Resources.Mappers.FieldOffsetReader.OffsetOf``1(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the value of on type . Works for public and internal/private fields, and for types that rejects because they carry managed function pointers (AtkStage, UIModule, RaptureHotbarModule).
member.exception: Field not found on the type.
Field exists but has no FieldOffsetAttribute.

member.name: M:Sharlayan.Resources.Mappers.FieldOffsetReader.SizeOf``1
member.summary: Returns the size declared on via [StructLayout(Size = N)]. Equivalent to for blittable types, but also works for FCS types that contain managed function pointers (which can't size).

member.name: M:Sharlayan.Resources.Providers.FFXIVClientStructsSignatureExtractor.BuildSignature(System.String,Sharlayan.Resources.Providers.FFXIVClientStructsSignatureExtractor.StaticAddressInfo,System.Int64)
member.summary: Convert an extracted FFXIVClientStructs StaticAddress entry into a Sharlayan Signature.
member.param: Scanner key expected by Sharlayan's Reader (e.g. "CHARMAP").
Byte offset inside the resolved struct to reach the field Sharlayan expects. For example CHARMAP is GameObjectManager + 0x20 for the _indexSorted pointer array.

member.name: M:Sharlayan.Resources.Providers.FFXIVClientStructsSignatureExtractor.BuildSignature(System.String,Sharlayan.Resources.Providers.FFXIVClientStructsSignatureExtractor.StaticAddressInfo,System.Int64[])
member.summary:
Multi-hop variant — used when the Sharlayan target lives behind a chain of pointer fields inside the FCS-resolved struct. Each element after the first becomes an additional PointerPath hop that ResolvePointerPath treats as a pointer dereference (only the first hop does the ASM RIP-follow). The very last offset is a non-deref trailing add, so the returned address = penultimate_ptr + offsetChain[^1].
Example: CHATLOG = Framework[isPointer] → UIModule @ Framework+0x2B68 → RaptureLogModule @ UIModule+0x19E0 offsetChain = [0x2B68, 0x19E0] final PointerPath = [rewindBack, 0 (deref Framework ptr), 0x2B68 (deref UIModule field), 0x19E0 (trailing add)]

member.name: M:Sharlayan.Resources.Providers.LuminaGameDataCache.GetOrNull(Sharlayan.SharlayanConfiguration)
member.summary: Returns the cached for the configuration's sqpack path, or null if the path can't be resolved or GameData construction fails. Used by per-frame / best-effort callers that must degrade gracefully.

member.name: M:Sharlayan.Resources.Providers.LuminaGameDataCache.Get(Sharlayan.SharlayanConfiguration)
member.summary: Returns the cached for the configuration's sqpack path, throwing if the path can't be resolved. Used by the xivdatabase provider's bulk loaders where a missing sqpack is a genuine configuration error.

member.name: M:Sharlayan.Utilities.LocalizationHelper.SelectLocalized(Sharlayan.Models.Localization,Sharlayan.Enums.GameLanguage)
member.summary: Returns the localised string for . Falls back to English when the requested language slot is null or when the language enum is (the default). Returns null only if the argument itself is null.
